items.name: jido_claw
items.description: JidoClaw — Open-source OpenClaw alternative built on Jido for Elixir/OTP. AI agent CLI with swarm orchestration, 30 tools, multi-provider support, and live terminal display.

items.name: skippy-persona
items.description: Drop-in AI persona files for Skippy the Magnificent from the Expeditionary Force series. Make your AI assistant call you a dumdum.

items.name: ark-vm-decomp
items.description: ArkoseLabs' FunCaptcha API.js virtual machine decompiled.

items.name: OpeN64
items.description: An open source N64 motherboard recreation made in KiCAD.

license.name: CERN Open Hardware Licence Version 2 - Permissive

items.name: manga
items.description: A modern, fast manga reader powered by MangaDex — built with Astro, React & Cloudflare Workers

items.name: sparkade-skills
items.description: Game development skills for building sparkade games

items.name: Talk
items.description: Open Typeless — on-device voice-to-text for macOS. Speak, polish, paste. No cloud, no typing.

items.name: awesome-f1
items.description: A curated collection of high-quality Formula 1 and motorsport resources — APIs, datasets, telemetry tools, visualization, sim racing, and learning materials.

items.name: tenderwatchafrica
items.description: AI agent that hunts government tenders across African procurement portals. Powered by TinyFish.

items.name: SoulHealer
items.description: Remakes thorium healer from the ground up, to make a more distinct and fun class, rather than just feeling like mage lite.

items.name: op_trace
items.description: OpTrace is a desktop EVM step debugger built with Tauri 2 + React 19 + Rust + REVM. It replays any Ethereum transaction opcode-by-opcode, letting you inspect the full execution state at every step — stack, memory, storage, logs, call tree, and more.

items.name: chatcn
items.description: Beautiful, open-source chat UI components for React. Messages, threads, reactions, file upload, 4 themes. Built on shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS.
